entries.title: Wave structure for multi-component features: parallel independent components first, sequential dependents second
ADR-002 col-025: synthesize_from_session Returns current_goal Directly
ADR-003 col-024: Structured Log Event on Primary-Path Fallback Activation
Long-wait parallel agent resumes with stale ADR context — tick-file agents must re-read architecture after 60+ min gaps
Use pre-cloned lock snapshot for new pipeline steps — never re-acquire the lock
